subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: [Then He said that] one day He was walking on a street in Germany when He noticed that a short woman—shorter even than our Fujita
subcodes.first_line_orig: روزی در آلمان در کوچه ای می رفتم دختری دیدم به قدر نصف این فوزیتا
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
